form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (17.11) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Has never missed the frame from five starts from the draw, including a win. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths third at Shepparton but did record a fast 22.19 over the 390m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 300m. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Scored by 1.3 lengths last time (19.41) in a Grade 5 over 350m at this track. Has one success and four minors from 10 starts from box 4. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

formComments.comment: Scored by 1.3 lengths last time (19.41) in a Grade 5 over 350m at this track. Has one success and four minors from 10 starts from box 4. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Comes to this track for the first time. Comes off an average run last start over 460m at Geelong when fifth behind Doongalla Ghost (26.60) in Grade 5. Hard to envisage a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked turning out of front straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won easily by 5 lengths at Shepparton (22.52) beating Jaicos in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 4. Not up to this.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on March 31 over 400m at Warragul behind Why Not Seb beaten 8 lengths (23.17) in a Grade 5. Has clocked a slick 19.36 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on March 22 over 350m at this track behind Michigan beaten 5 lengths (19.36) in a Free For All. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.
